user.title: Connect to iSolarCloud
user.description: Enter your iSolarCloud API credentials and account details. You can get your API keys here: [iSolarCloud Developer Portal]({url})

data_description.app_key: AppKey from iSolarCloud Developer Platform (V1, non-OAuth).
data_description.app_secret: App Secret (x-access-key) from iSolarCloud Developer Platform.
